---
name: "\U0001F41B Bug Report"
about: "\U0001F41E Report a defect, regression, or unexpected behavior so we can reproduce
  and fix it quickly."
title: "\U0001F41B Bug: <Component/Area> — <Concise Summary> (Platform: <Desktop/Mobile>,
  Operating System (OS): <OS>, Browser: <Browser> <Version>, Application Version:
  <x.y.z>)"
labels: 'priority: To be determined (TBD), status: Needs triage, type: Bug'
assignees: tannergolden

---

<!--
Thank you for helping improve quality!

Please provide clear, reproducible details. Remove any sensitive data (secrets, tokens, personally identifiable information (PII)).
-->

## 📌 What this template is for (and not for)

**Use this template for:**  
- Crashes, errors, or broken features  
- Unexpected behavior compared to expected outcomes  
- Reproducible defects with clear steps to reproduce  

**Don’t use this template for:**  
- Usability or design suggestions → use **📝 Feedback Report**  
- Performance concerns (lag, memory usage) → use **🚀 Performance Report**  
- Documentation issues → use **📖 Documentation Report**  
- Accessibility-specific problems → use **♿ Accessibility Report**  
- Feature ideas or enhancements → use **✨ Feature Request**  
- Security vulnerabilities → follow **SECURITY.md** (responsible disclosure) 

---

## ✍️ Summary
<!-- One or two sentences describing the problem -->
<!-- Example: "Saving a draft throws 500 when the title is empty." -->

## 👥 Who Is Affected
<!-- Audience/persona (e.g., all users, admins, mobile users). Estimate scope if known (All / Many / Some / Few). -->

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce
<!-- Precise, numbered steps that consistently reproduce the issue -->
1.
2.
3.
4.

## ❗ Actual Result
<!-- What happened? Include on-screen errors and relevant behavior -->

## ✅ Expected Result
<!-- What you expected to happen instead -->

## 📎 Evidence
<!-- Add screenshots, recordings, or links that illustrate the issue. Redact sensitive data. -->

## 🧰 Environment
- Platform: Web / Mobile / Desktop
- Device (for mobile): e.g., iPhone 15 Pro / Pixel 8
- Operating System (OS) & version: e.g., macOS 14.5, Windows 11, iOS 17.5, Android 14
- Web Browser & version: e.g., Chrome 128, Safari 17.5, Firefox 128, Edge 128
- Application version (Semantic Versioning (SemVer)): `x.y.z`
- Branch / Commit SHA (Secure Hash Algorithm): `Development|Preview|Release` / `abcdef1`
- Firebase Project ID (if relevant): `your-project-id`
- Using Firebase Emulator Suite: Yes / No
- Network conditions (if relevant): Wi-Fi / Cellular, approximate speed/latency

## 📜 Logs / Errors
<!-- Paste relevant logs and stack traces; sanitize secrets and Uniform Resource Locators (URLs). Indent logs as a code block, like below. -->

    <logs here>

## 🔄 Reproducibility
- Frequency: Always / Often / Intermittent / Rare
- Regression: Did this work before? Yes / No  
  - If Yes, last known good version/commit:

## 🎯 Impact / Severity
- Severity: Critical / High / Medium / Low
- Scope: User Interface (UI) / Application Programming Interface (API) / Database / Build / Deployment / Other
- Users affected (estimate): All / Many / Some / Few

## 🩹 Workarounds
<!-- Any temporary mitigation steps -->

## 🔗 Additional Context / Links
<!-- Related issues, Pull Requests (PRs), discussions, documents, or analytics dashboards -->

---

### ✅ Reporter Checklist
- [ ] I searched existing issues and did not find a duplicate.
- [ ] I included exact reproduction steps and environment details.
- [ ] I provided screenshots/recordings/logs where possible (redacted).
- [ ] I removed or obfuscated secrets and personally identifiable information (PII).
